clauses.title: Has a last-updated date
clauses.guidance: The terms clearly state when they were last revised.

clauses.title: Only available to users of a certain age
clauses.guidance: Use of the service is restricted to users above a minimum age.

clauses.title: Tracking pixels and/or device fingerprinting
clauses.guidance: The service uses tracking pixels, web beacons, or device fingerprinting to identify or track users.

clauses.title: Service provided 'as is' with no warranty of uninterrupted or accurate service
clauses.guidance: The service disclaims warranties and does not guarantee uptime, accuracy, or error-free operation.

clauses.title: You must defend, indemnify, and hold the service harmless
clauses.guidance: The user agrees to indemnify the service against claims arising from the user's use.

clauses.title: Ignores the Do Not Track (DNT) browser signal
clauses.guidance: The service explicitly states it does not honor Do Not Track headers.

clauses.title: Can delete your account or content without prior notice or reason
clauses.guidance: The service reserves the right to terminate accounts or remove content without warning or justification.

clauses.title: Terms may change at any time without notice to the user
clauses.guidance: The service may modify the terms unilaterally and is not required to notify users.

clauses.title: You are responsible for your account's security and activity
clauses.guidance: The user bears responsibility for safeguarding credentials and for activity on the account; the service disclaims liability.

clauses.title: Does not sell your personal data
clauses.guidance: The service commits to not selling users' personal data to third parties.

clauses.title: You can request access to and deletion of your personal data
clauses.guidance: Users have the right to access and delete the personal data the service holds about them.

clauses.title: Can sell your personal data
clauses.guidance: The service reserves the right to sell or share users' personal data with third parties for value.

clauses.title: Your data may be processed and stored anywhere in the world
clauses.guidance: The service may transfer and store data in jurisdictions other than the user's own.

clauses.title: Uses third-party cookies for statistics and/or advertising
clauses.guidance: The service sets third-party cookies for analytics or advertising purposes.

clauses.title: You can opt out of promotional communications
clauses.guidance: Users may unsubscribe from marketing or promotional messages.

clauses.title: You have the right to leave the service at any time
clauses.guidance: Users may close their account and stop using the service whenever they choose.

clauses.title: You will be notified when the terms change
clauses.guidance: The service commits to notifying users of material changes to the terms.
